message:
refactor: simplify session name handling and improve edit overlap detection

Two refactoring improvements:

1. session_sqlite.rs: Simplify session name persistence — always
   write the name key to pi_session_meta (even when empty) instead
   of conditionally writing only when a name is present. This
   removes the has_name_key tracking variable and ensures consistent
   schema. Also simplifies message_count detection: no longer
   gates on has_name_key, just checks if message_count exists.

2. tools.rs (HashlineEditTool): Extend overlap detection from
   replace-only to all edit operations. Previously only checked
   for overlapping replace ranges; now checks all resolved edits
   regardless of operation type (replace, insert, delete). Also
   improves the error message to name both operation types and
   suggest combining overlapping edits into a single operation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
